summary: Deploy Pipeline testing complete. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with Deploy tab working correctly in Governance Panel. Pipeline correctly blocks at unit_test gate (expected behavior - pre-existing test failures). Auto-Rollback Triggers card shows real metric values. Smoke tests pass 8/8.
critical_code_review_comments: Pipeline correctly implements hard-gate CI/CD - no || true, stops on first failure
All 6 gates are blocking: lint, unit_test, security_audit, migration_check, build, smoke_test
Auto-rollback triggers use real metrics: APM error rate, health endpoint, DB ping, outbox backlog, import failures
Smoke tests hit real endpoints: health, auth, rooms, bookings, guests, settings
Frontend axios baseURL is '${REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}/api' so API calls don't include '/api' prefix
All data-testid attributes properly set: deploy-tab, run-smoke-btn, run-pipeline-btn, triggers-card, pipeline-status-card, gate-{id}, trigger-{id}, smoke-{id}
seed_data_creation: Created test pipeline runs and rollback records during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deploy Pipeline is fully functional. Test file test_deploy_pipeline_api.py covers all 13 endpoints. Pipeline blocks at unit_test gate due to pre-existing test failures in /app/backend/tests/ - this is expected behavior demonstrating hard-gate CI/CD. Smoke tests pass 8/8. Auto-rollback triggers show real metrics. Frontend Deploy tab is the 5th tab in Governance Panel at /admin/governance.

pipeline.GET /api/deploy/pipeline/gates: Returns 6 gate definitions (lint, unit_test, security_audit, migration_check, build, smoke_test)
pipeline.POST /api/deploy/pipeline/start: Creates new pipeline run with status=running, all gates pending
pipeline.POST /api/deploy/pipeline/run-all: Runs all gates sequentially, stops on first failure
pipeline.GET /api/deploy/pipelines: Lists recent pipeline runs with status, gates, passed_gates
pipeline.GET /api/deploy/pipeline/{id}: Returns specific pipeline details, 404 for nonexistent

migration.GET /api/deploy/migration/verify: Schema drift detection, index validation, verdict (PASS/WARN/FAIL)

smoke_tests.POST /api/deploy/smoke-tests/run: Runs 8 HTTP smoke tests (health, auth, rooms, bookings, guests, settings)

rollback.GET /api/deploy/rollback/evaluate: Evaluates real metrics against thresholds, returns recommendation
rollback.POST /api/deploy/rollback/execute: Executes manual rollback with smoke test verification

analysis.GET /api/deploy/analysis/overview: Combined view: canary status + trigger evaluation + last pipeline

components.pipeline_status_card: Shows pipeline ID, status (PASSED/FAILED), gate statuses with icons and durations
components.auto_rollback_triggers_card: Shows 5 triggers with real metric values, thresholds, and status (SAGLAM/DIKKAT/ROLLBACK)
components.smoke_test_button: Runs smoke tests and displays results card
components.pipeline_calistir_button: Runs full pipeline and updates status card
components.pipeline_history: Shows recent pipeline runs with status badges

expected_behavior_notes.pipeline_blocks_at_unit_test: Pipeline correctly blocks at unit_test gate due to pre-existing test failures in /app/backend/tests/. This demonstrates hard-gate CI/CD working as designed - no || true, no soft failures.
expected_behavior_notes.smoke_tests_pass: All 8 smoke tests pass (health liveness, health basic, health db, auth login, rooms list, bookings list, guests list, settings)
